ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the optimization experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., completed, running) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the experiment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the experiment */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was last modified */,
  "algorithm_used" TEXT /* Optimization algorithm used in the experiment */,
  "dataset" TEXT /* Dataset used for the experiment */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the experiment is run */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "iterations" (
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each iteration */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment associated with this iteration */,
  "iteration_number" INTEGER /* The iteration number within the experiment */,
  "regret_bound" REAL /* The regret bound value for the iteration */,
  "incumbent_val_metric" REAL /* The incumbent value metric for the iteration */,
  "gp_noise_var" REAL /* The noise variance used in the Gaussian process */,
  "total_train_time" REAL /* Total training time taken for the iteration (in seconds) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the iteration */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the iteration */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the iteration was last modified */,
  "iteration_description" TEXT /* A description of the iteration, including any specific changes or notes */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* JSON string of hyperparameters used in this iteration */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model used in this iteration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iteration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_iterations_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment or iteration */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the iteration being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_iteration_id FOREIGN KEY ("iteration_id") REFERENCES iterations ("iteration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the iteration this metric is associated with */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., regret bound, training time) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the metric, including any relevant details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_iteration_id FOREIGN KEY ("iteration_id") REFERENCES iterations ("iteration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment to which this parameter belongs */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the parameter was set */,
  "parameter_description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter and its purpose */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_parameters_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the result corresponds to */,
  "final_regret_bound" REAL /* Final regret bound after all iterations */,
  "final_incumbent_val_metric" REAL /* Final incumbent value metric after all iterations */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the result was recorded */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Description of the final result, including any insights or conclusions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment related to the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Date when the notification was read by the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., unread, read) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., data scientist, analyst) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of the permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was last modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
